titleStmt.title: SII 28.231: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 231. (A.R. No. 386 of 1913.)

summary.p: Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, south wall.

p.hi: Māṟavarman Vīrapāṇḍya Year 5, Siṁha śu. 8, Saturday, Anusham.
p.note: According to L.D.S. Pillai (A.R.Ep., 1914, p.65). the details of date given correspond to 1257 A.D. (1267 A.D. as printed is an error) August 18; 07; 28 in the reign of the Māṟavarman Vīra-Pāṇḍya, the conqueror of Īḻam and Koṅgu, date of whose accession has been calculated in 1254 A.D. (A.R.Ep., 1922, para 34) However, it is seen that the details of date given also correspond to 1338 A.D., August 22 f.d.t. -64; f.d.n. -66. in the reign of Māṟavarman Vīra-pāṇḍya whose date of accesion has been calculated in 1334 A.D. Inscriptions of the latter have been reported at TiruvāmāttUr, Villupuram taluk, South Arcot District (6/1922) and Muḍiyanūr, TirukkōyilUr Taluk, South Arcot District (268/1934-35) etc. (See A.R.Ep., 1934-35, paras 22-23).

summary.p: The inscription is very much damaged. It records the sale of 2 mā of land as tirunāmattukāṇi in favour of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuḍaiya Aḻagiya-Nāchchiyār in the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār of Śiṟuttirukkōyil in [Uṟumūr] alias Vikramachōḻachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, to the Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēva-kaṉmigaḷ of that temple by the mahāsabhā of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmat kittikkumel komāṟapaṉmar‘ṉmar’ is written below the line.
tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīvira
pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 5vatu
siṁhanāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu Aṭṭamiyum
caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattu nāḷ Uṟumurā
ṉa vikracoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu
makāsabhaiyom Ivūr
Uṭaiyār ciṟuttirukkoyi
luṭaiyār koyil Ātica
ṇṭeśvara tevakaṉmikaḷuk
ku nāṅkaḷ nilavilai prāmāṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ikkoyiṟ
tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya Aḻakiyanācciyārkku tirunā
mattukkāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nila
māvatu meṟkumāyiṉa pakkattu
Iṉṉāyanār tevatāṉattukku meṟkkuppaṭṭa nila
ttuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Arai māvum veḻama
ṭai vāykkālukku vaṭakku lluvāy Eṉṟu
perkūvappaṭṭa taṭi muṉṟiṉāl nilam Orumā
vum Iṅku viṭṭu kaṇṇaṉ kuḷattukku kiḻakku teṟṟā
ṭi paḷḷam Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattu meṟ
very much damaged
Iṉṉila miraṇṭu māvum
viṟṟu kuṭuttomāticaṇṭe
śvara tevakaṉmikaḷukku ma
hāsabhaiyom Ivai
maṅkalattu Uttamapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu § Ivai
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai ce
nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai
ciṅka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
ṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
